text: Just a touch of flu I think — mild fever, a bit of tiredness, dry throat. 3 day(s), though I notice it's not improving. I'm a bit short of breath.
label: influenza/mild

text: Slight fever, some body aches, scratchy throat. Probably flu starting, 8 day(s), though it seems to be slowly resolving. My temperature is really elevated.
label: influenza/mild

text: Woke up feeling rough: chills, headache, that fluey feeling. About 8 day(s) in. My temperature is really elevated.
label: influenza/mild
